name: Signal Handler Race Condition
description: The product uses a signal handler that introduces a race condition by calling non-reentrant functions or performing state-sensitive operations that may be invoked asynchronously at unpredictable times, potentially corrupting state or enabling code execution.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node registers a signal handler containing calls to non-reentrant TRANSFORM functions or shared STORAGE access, creating race condition when signal interrupts normal execution flow
